examples: CONVIVIAL, and not averse to a drink, Nancy Wake could often be found cheering up a cocktail bar.
WHEN friends go out to dinner, the convivial atmosphere can be shattered once the waiter brings the bill.
The crowds are convivial and loathe to leave as the clock ticks toward last call.
The elegant and convivial Royal Mile Tavern works its charms well, with polished wood, brass and mirrors.
